universes.label: Market Intelligence
universes.purpose: Monitor markets, sectors, companies, trends, weak signals, and portfolio-relevant movements.

universes.label: Technology Breakthroughs
universes.purpose: Monitor emerging technologies, scientific breakthroughs, invention opportunities, and design-route candidates.

universes.label: Existing Systems
universes.purpose: Monitor external market systems, vendor platforms, operational workflows, and replacement opportunities from approved public or operator-provided sources.

universes.label: Acquisition Targets
universes.purpose: Monitor acquirer fit, category creation, strategic value, marketability, and package-readiness signals.
